signal.description: diapr.ai conflict detector repeatedly flags current-run turn against previous-run accepted turns

evidence.value: Run run_954fc3dc8164adc2, turn turn_e8980b447123e0dc. AgentXChain reported turn_conflicted on 2026-05-02T04:26:03Z and again on 2026-05-02T04:33:07Z for .planning/IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md, app/styles.css, tests/diapr-core.test.mjs. conflict_state.accepted_since listed turn_fdbed710bb1ec95e and turn_d6be2cf77e0a19b8 from prior run run_0b00ed1aa694dda8, even though current run baseline/checkpoints should already include prior-run accepted work. reject-turn --reassign exhausted retry budget and re-conflicted; staged result was schema-valid and npm run verify plus CSS guard passed. Workaround used: agentxchain accept-turn --turn turn_e8980b447123e0dc --resolution human_merge, then checkpoint-turn and resume QA. This unblocked run and checkpointed 36eb68e0c691848395b2f764fe0bfd33cf8c2818.
